parameters.query: INSERT INTO payments (charge_id, source_id, payment_type, ref_no, customer_name, customer_phone, description, amount, status, qr_image, expires_at, created_by, branch_code, branch_name, raw_omise) VALUES ('{{ $json.charge_id }}','{{ $json.source_id }}','{{ $json.payment_type }}','{{ ($json.ref_no || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}','{{ ($json.customer_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}','{{ $json.customer_phone }}','{{ ($json.description || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.amount }}, '{{ $json.status }}', '{{ $json.qr_image }}', {{ $json.expires_at ? "'" + $json.expires_at + "'" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ $json.created_by }}', '{{ $json.branch_code }}', '{{ ($json.branch_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.raw_omise.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (charge_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING payment_id, charge_id, qr_image, status, expires_at, amount, created_at, ref_no, customer_name;
SELECT charge_id, status, amount, paid_at, expires_at, ref_no, customer_name FROM payments WHERE charge_id = '{{ $json.body.charge_id }}';
UPDATE payments SET status = 'cancelled' WHERE charge_id = '{{ $json.body.charge_id }}' AND status = 'pending' RETURNING charge_id, status;

SELECT charge_id, payment_type, ref_no, customer_name, customer_phone, description, amount, status, qr_image, expires_at, paid_at, created_at, branch_code, branch_name FROM payments WHERE created_at::date BETWEEN '{{ $json.body.date_from }}' AND '{{ $json.body.date_to }}' {{ $json.body.branch_code ? "AND branch_code = '" + $json.body.branch_code + "'" : '' }} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 500;
